sections.paragraph:
f. עַזָּה, pl. עַזִּים-(A) adj.-

(1) strong, vehement, spoken of a people, Num 13:28 of a wind, Exo 14:21 of the waves, Neh 9:11 Isa 43:16 of anger, Gen 49:7 Pro 21:14.

(2) strong, fortified, Num 21:24.

(3) harsh, cruel, hard, of a king, Isa 19:4 עַז־ פָּנִים hard of face, i.e. impudent, shameless, Deu 28:50 Dan 8:23.

(B) subst. strength, might, Gen 49:3. Root עָזַז
